entry.title: Re: How to identify the exact SQL query sent to source system?
entry.content:
Thanks @JimSpath, but we work with remote systems that we can't always have that level of access, and if we can it could take days.
Ideally, I would like to be able to see it in the DSP or in the HANA Cockpit.

entry.title: Re: Disabling Advanced Planning-Relevant MRP Area
entry.content:
This information is available in the following SAP Official Documentation: 
SAP Help Portal - Disabling Advanced Planning-Relevant Material Creation 
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/f899ce30af9044299d573ea30b533f1c/fac08b402d5b46a3a71fc5b4091f210e.html?locale=en-US

"An MRP area assigned to a material which is marked as Advanced Planning relevant is also automatically classified as Advanced Planning relevant.

It is not possible to phase out a single MRP area from PP/DS Planning by changing the planning status to Marked for deactivation. An MRP area can only have the Marked for Deletion status.

To do this, you can select the deletion indicator on the header screen area for MRP data maintenance in material master data.

This indicator can only be set after the MRP area has got a planning status Marked for deactivation assigned on the Advanced Planning tab and the Where-Used-Check (WUC) functionality has determined that the MRP area is not used anymore in any PP/DS planning object. If no references are found, the deletion indicator field checkbox can be selected. This WUC functionality can be triggered from the MRP Maintenance UI screens in the material master data maintenance.

(...)

Set Deletion Indicator for MRP areas

To set the deletion indicator for an MRP area assigned to a material with Advanced Planning indicator, proceed with the following steps:

  1. Call up the MM02 transaction for the material in plant to which the MRP area is assigned.

  2. Choose MRP1 tab to view the MRP area maintenance screen.

  3. Select the Advanced Planning tab and swap the planning status from Active for Planning to Marked for Deactivation. Choose Save to save your changes.

  4. Call up MM02 transaction again and navigate to the MRP area maintenance screens.

  5. Choose the Advanced Planning tab and choose the Where-Used Check button to trigger the reference check. (If the system finds an object where the product or location is being used, then it will not allow you to set the deletion indicator)

  6. If you find references to any object, use the report /SAPAPO/PPDS_PPSKZ_RESET to get details about the references and remove them from the system.

  7. If there are no references found, you can set the deletion indicator that is enabled on the header area of the MRP area data maintenance UI screen.

  8. Choose Save.

Phase Out Material and MRP Areas from PP/DS Planning

Setting the deletion indicator at the MRP area level does not remove the location or product from PP/DS. You must perform the following steps at the material or plant level to remove the Advanced Planning indicator from a single material with all assigned MRP areas in a plant:

  1. Call up transaction MM02 for material in plant. Select Advanced Planning tab and swap planning status from Active for Planning to Marked for deactivation. Save your changes.

  2. Choose MRP1 tab to view the MRP area maintenance screen.

  3. Select the Advanced Planning tab and swap the planning status from Active for Planningto Marked for Deactivation. Choose Save to save your changes.

  4. Call up MM02 transaction again and navigate to the Advanced Planning tab.

  5. Choose the Where-Used Check button to trigger the reference check. (If the system finds an object where the product or location is being used, it will not allow you to remove the Advanced Planning indicator)

  6. If you find references to any object, use the report /SAPAPO/PPDS_PPSKZ_RESET to get details about the references and remove them from the system.

  7. If there are no references found, you can remove the Advanced Planning indicator.

  8. Choose Save."

entry.title: Re: Mass Change Active Materials Type - All materials ROH - FERT
entry.content:
Thank you for the reply ArnoBrouwer,

I'm not sure why I can't comment directly to you. I think marking them delete would work. And then creating them again.  I think we would have to use different numbers. Then all the historical data based around that material -- we couldn't link it with the new material. (To my knowledge)   I guess the question is do you know how to link the two materials so the historical data would not be lost?   I believe all the transactional data that would have to be changed.

entry.title: Re: Adaptation Project Replace Odata In BAS?
entry.content: Does this mean that the adaptation project will always call the entities of the same standard, even though a copy of the FAC_GRIR_RECONCILIATION odata is made? Therefore, we must use the metadata extension since I have ABAP code within the SEGW in the Odata Z that I created as a copy of the standard? What would be the suggestion?

entry.title: How to use USHELL API in SAP WORKZONE
entry.content:
Im developing a UI Integration Card in SAP WORKZONE Adv. version.

There seem to be two following issues, and if anyone knows well, please help.

1. Creating an app using a smart table on my card. In that app, I want to use use VariantManagement to provide Variant Storage.. VariantManagement doesn't work.

It works well if you make it into a UI5 freestyle app and deploy it, but it doesn't work on Workzone Card.

2. On the card, when you try to use sap.ushell.container (SHELL API), an error occurs. When you check from the console, there is no sap.ushell.container object on the Workzone Card.

The above two causes are assumed to exist in a different context than Workzone Shell because the workzone card is serviced in the form of iframe, and therefore the varaint personalization and the husell API cannot be used because of the lack of access to the husell service.

Accordingly, is there any other way to use USHELL?

Additionally, I found someone with a similar problem to me, and this person seems to be calling the API with postMessage

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/multi-tenant-cap-application-integration-in-build-work-zone-via-iframe/ba-p/13562133

Is there any other way other than that?
SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition 
@

entry.title: Service Cloud: Possible to convert a characteristic into a key figure in order to calculate?
entry.content:
Hello all, 

I want to convert a characteristic into a key figure in order to calculate with it. Is this possible or not?

My business scenario is: I want to check wheater the SLA of a ticket is fulfilled or not. Therefore I want to subtract the fields 'Initial Review due' with 'Initial Review completed'. If it is a positive value, it was fulfilled. If it is a negative value, it was not fulfilled (show it in red, if possible).

I currently dont see an option to convert the characteristic into key figure in order to calculate. 

But hopefully, I am wrong... 
Can anybody help?

Best reagds,
Deborah

#C4C #servicecloud #report # reporting #calculate #characteristic #keyfigure

entry.title: Deleting Business Users
entry.content:

2) Need to import new business users in Test system. Please suggest us how to upload users in Manage workforce tile?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Fixed Asset Master data and capitalization for the de...
entry.content: That's it, Yang. You'll use the FA Master Entry for the depreciation from now on, but use a JE just to adjust the Balance Sheet with the past information that you want to be able to see in future accounting reports.

entry.title: Re: Deleting Business Users
entry.content:
1. If the employee was created by replication from SAP SuccessFactors, it is not necessary to first delete the employee in SAP SuccessFactors and replicate the deletion. You need to follow these steps if an inconsistency was found on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition or ask an SAP Product Support engineer for assistance.

There are 3 sets of data, work assignment, business partner and business user. To delete all these data, there are corresponding ILM objects for which a few configurations are required. These configuration details can be found in SAP Help Portal Data Management for HR Connectivity and Workforce Details | SAP Help Portal.

2. Kindly follow the SAP Help Portal How to Import Worker Data | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Re: Adaptation Project Replace Odata In BAS?
entry.content: This app is made with fiori elements

entry.title: Re: how to set up PMR automatically when Production order...
entry.content:
Hello,

Please refer to OSS note - 

3133948 - How to trigger the automatic EWM staging upon the production order release

Resolution

Since the "Posting Change Item" is a kind of "Delivery", if you want to trigger automatic EWM staging, you have to set the "WM Request" field of the Production Scheduling Profile as "2 - Transfer Reqmt, Transfer Order, and Delivery Upon Release".

entry.title: Re: Read/validate xml namespace using groovy script in SA...
entry.content: Thanks but I am then uable to set the property using this namespace variable. Below is the code

entry.title: Re: Read/validate xml namespace using groovy script in SA...
entry.content: <xsl:stylesheet version="3.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" xmlns:sapci="http://sap.com/it/" exclude-result-prefixes="sapci"> <xsl:param name="exchange"/> <xsl:param name="nspace"/> <xsl:template match="/"> <xsl:variable name="nspace" select="//namespace::*"/> <xsl:value-of select="sapci:setProperty($exchange, 'MyProperty', $nspace)"/> <!-- <xsl:value-of select="sapci:setProperty($exchange, 'MyProperty', 'Testing 1-2-3')"/> --> <message>Hello, world!</message> </xsl:template> </xsl:stylesheet>

Best regards,

-Jaspher

entry.title: Procurement 2025 - Through the looking glass 🔎
entry.content:
Discover the pivotal trends 💫 and insights revolutionizing procurement today and shaping its future, exclusively in our live stream.

Discover how SAP Ariba is addressing these evolving needs with innovative solutions. Corinna and Gordon will explore the drivers of digitalization, upcoming tech trends identified by research, and strategies on how Procurement leaders can align to elevate the function within their business.

📢Don't miss this opportunity to stay ahead in the rapidly changing world of procurement.

entry.title: Re: Build your app (new UI)?
entry.content: Hi. Recently we updated the Build Service UI. The limits on Builds are intended for Free Tier (NOT the free edition/Community edition). This is a bug and we are working on a fix now.

entry.title: IA38 Mass change not working
entry.content:
Hello,

we want to use IA38 to change the purchase group for some task list operations. We mark the lines (see screenshot1.jpg) and then we select "Goto -> Mass change -> Change task list operation". But we got an information that task list is not current, update table (see screenshot2.jpg).

Has anyone any idea why this mass transaction does not work?

Best regards, Stefan

entry.title: Re: Read/validate xml namespace using groovy script in SA...

Vivek

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
@m_sarosh welcome to SAP Community. I live in the US outside of Philadelphia. If you didn't yet please be sure to register for TechEd and join the SAP TechEd - SAP Community

The sessions are all interactive and please bring questions that you want to get answered. Hopefully by engaging with other community members before, during, after you'll build your network too!

Best of luck!

This is in this line where I am trying to set the ns value from variable nspace into Myproperty. <xsl:value-of select="sapci:setProperty($exchange, 'MyProperty', $nspace)"/>

entry.title: Waste Storage Location not appearing in Waste Stream
entry.content:
Hello,

I want to create a waste stream with a handling type that will require an internal transfer request to move waste to a Storage Location first. However, when I specify the type and move on to create a waste stream, no field labeled as waste storage location appear to fill in. Also, the following message appears; "Mandatory field "Waste Storage Location" must be filled".

Kindly advise.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Read/validate xml namespace using groovy script in SA...
entry.content:
@BhavenI'm referring to the following change to your XSLT

<xsl:stylesheet version="3.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" xmlns:sapci="http://sap.com/it/" exclude-result-prefixes="sapci">
<xsl:param name="exchange"/>
<xsl:template match="/">
<xsl:variable name="nspace" select="//namespace::*"/>
<xsl:value-of select="sapci:setProperty($exchange, 'MyProperty', $nspace)"/>
<message>Hello, world!</message>
</xsl:template>
</xsl:stylesheet>

entry.title: Re: Visual Studio 2022 & Crystal Reports 2008
entry.content:
Yes, but

  • you need to install Crystal for VS
  • you need to have 64-bit connectivity to your data source.

entry.title: Analytic Stories
entry.content:
Hi,

We have just started to utilise Analytic Stories and I had a few questions.

  • Is it possible to group columns/rows in AS? e.g I have monthly columns, I add a calculation for quarters and then group them into quarters?
  • How can I format characters e.g. $ or % signs
  • Is there an a site that shares the basics of AS? I know there is the what’s new and the Manage Analytics Stories page but it’s not really a ‘walkthrough’.

Thanks in advance,

Scott

entry.title: Re: How to Export CO46/MD04 to Spreadsheet
entry.content:
Thanks for sharing! That was exactly what I needed today. 

I made a smaller implementation, in which all fields are available. Perhaps useful for more people?

 

  DATA :
    zgv_repid   LIKE sy-repid,
    zgv_variant TYPE disvariant,
    zgs_layout  TYPE slis_layout_alv.

  DATA(zlt_fieldcat) = CORRESPONDING slis_t_fieldcat_alv( it_fieldcat ).
  DATA(zlt_tree_lines) = it_tree_lines.

  INSERT
    VALUE slis_fieldcat_alv( 
        fieldname = 'PARENT_NODE'  seltext_m = 'Parent Node'  col_pos = 1
        row_pos = 1  tabname = '1' outputlen = 12 
        rollname = 'LVC_NKEY' datatype = 'CHAR' 
        inttype = 'C' intlen = 12 )
  INTO zlt_fieldcat INDEX 1.

  INSERT
    VALUE slis_fieldcat_alv( 
        fieldname = 'NODE'  seltext_m = 'Node'  col_pos = 1
        row_pos = 1  tabname = '1' outputlen = 12 
        rollname = 'LVC_NKEY' datatype = 'CHAR' 
        inttype = 'C' intlen = 12 )
  INTO zlt_fieldcat INDEX 1.

  zgv_repid = sy-repid.
  CALL FUNCTION 'REUSE_ALV_GRID_DISPLAY'
    EXPORTING
      is_layout               = zgs_layout
      i_callback_program      = zgv_repid
      i_callback_user_command = 'USER_COMMAND'
      it_fieldcat             = zlt_fieldcat
      i_save                  = 'A'
      is_variant              = zgv_variant
    TABLES
      t_outtab                = zlt_tree_lines
    EXCEPTIONS
      program_error           = 1
      OTHERS                  = 2.
  IF sy-subrc <> 0.
    RETURN.
  ENDIF.

 

If needed, this can be extended by setting some fields displayed by default: 

 

  LOOP AT zlt_fieldcat ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<zfs_fieldcat>).
    CASE <zfs_fieldcat>-fieldname.
      WHEN  'NODE'  OR  'PARENT_NODE' OR 'MATNR'
        OR  'MAKTX' OR  'BDDAT'       OR 'MNG01'
        OR  'MEINS' OR  'RCDAT'       OR 'RCEBO'
        OR  'RCENR' OR  'RCEPS'       OR 'RCEB0'.
        <zfs_fieldcat>-no_out = abap_false.
      WHEN OTHERS.
        <zfs_fieldcat>-no_out = abap_true.
    ENDCASE.
  ENDLOOP.
  UNASSIGN <zfs_fieldcat>.

 

Or for changing column header names: 

 

  LOOP AT zlt_fieldcat ASSIGNING <zfs_fieldcat>.
    CASE <zfs_fieldcat>-fieldname.
      WHEN 'BDDAT'.
        <zfs_fieldcat>-seltext_m =  'Requirements Date'.
      WHEN   'RCDAT'.
        <zfs_fieldcat>-seltext_m =  'Receipt Date'.
      WHEN OTHERS.
    ENDCASE.
  ENDLOOP.

I have the login and password for both user IDs and can update my details, but there is no option to change the company (unlink).

entry.title: TESM and LRDTSA Calculation Methods in Intelligent Forecast
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a case I try on SAP B1 Hana to test Intelligent Forecast and done following steps:

1- First add sales order from 1/1/2024 to 12/8/2024 by following Quantity as steps (11-12-14-15-18-24-26-28-30) and added in start date 1/9/2024 End Date 31/12/2024, and set monthly on view and set item in Item No. that added transaction in sales order , then choose intelligent forecast 

2- choose Maximum History time buckets 30 and then add forecast the LRDSTA calc method show as standard, despite I choose standard calc Method 

I have 2 question :

1-why appear  LRDSTA calc method show as standard, despite I choose standard calc Method 

2- How TESM and LRDTSA working when i choose Maximum History time Buckets by months cause when i choose TESM the table forecast as months from September to December is deferent

Could you please tell me how the equation works, and why the results is calculate deferent when i fixed all data and run forecast again?

and how TESM and LRDTSA working when change alpha &beta& gama

    

when I choose Alpha beta and Gama or is set to 0.001 the total quantity change as capture

entry.title: SAP CodeJam in Luzern/Lucerne
entry.content:
Sei beim SAP CodeJam in Luzern dabei

Wir freuen uns riesig, ankündigen zu können, dass in Luzern ein SAP CodeJam Event zum Thema SAP Build: Create Business Apps and Processes Without Code stattfinden wird - und wir möchten dich unbedingt dabei haben! Dies ist deine Chance, in praxisnahes Lernen einzutauchen und dich mit Gleichgesinnten und Experten zu vernetzen.

Warum solltest du teilnehmen?

SAP CodeJams zeichnen sich durch eine informelle Atmosphäre aus, in der das Lernen Spaß macht und Kreativität gefördert wird. Die Teilnahme bietet dir unter anderem folgende Möglichkeiten:

  • Bleibe zu neusten SAP-Technologien auf dem Laufenden
  • Lerne direkt von SAP-Experten, die dich in Theorie und Praxis in ein Thema einführen
  • Setze dich aktiv mit Programmierübungen auseinander und erhalte persönliche Unterstützung
  • Vernetze dich mit Branchenkollegen und erweitere dein berufliches Netzwerk

Event-Rahmenbedingungen:

  • Datum: Mittwoch, 30. Oktober 2024
  • Zeit: 09:00 - 16:00 Uhr
  • Ort: KKL, Europaplatz 1, 6003 Luzern
  • Sprache: Englisch
  • Mittagessen & Kaffeepausen: inklusive

Alle Details sowie die Möglichkeit zur Anmeldung findest du unter nachfolgendem Link. Es können maximal 26 Personen teilnehmen, also melde dich frühzeitig an, um deinen Platz zu sichern:

SAP CodeJAM Luzern

Wir freuen uns, mit dir einen tollen Event verbringen zu dürfen.

Deine SAP Community Luzern

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Join Us for the SAP CodeJam in Lucerne

We are thrilled to announce that a SAP CodeJam event on the topic "SAP Build: Create Business Apps and Processes Without Code" will be taking place in Lucerne - and we definitely want you to be there! This is your chance to dive into hands-on learning and network with like-minded individuals and experts.

Why Should You Attend?

SAP CodeJams are known for their informal atmosphere, where learning is fun and creativity is encouraged. By participating, you'll have the opportunity to:

  • Stay up-to-date with the latest SAP technologies
  • Learn directly from SAP experts who will introduce you to a topic both theoretically and practically
  • Engage actively with coding exercises and receive personalized support
  • Network with industry peers and expand your professional connections

Event Details:

  • Date: Wednesday, October 30, 2024
  • Time: 09:00 AM - 4:00 PM
  • Location: KKL, Europaplatz 1, 6003 Lucerne
  • Language: English
  • Lunch & Coffee Breaks: Included

You can find all the details and the registration link below. There are only 26 spots available, so be sure to register early to secure your place:

SAP CodeJam Lucerne

We look forward to spending a great event with you.

Your SAP Community Lucerne

entry.title: Re: Password policy update on SAP netweaver
entry.content:
Only users of type DIALOG and COMMUNICATION are affected. The ones of type SYSTEM and SERVICE are not.

You can see the difference when you reset the password of an user of each type. On the first ones (DIALOG and COMM) when you reset the password, the user is forced to set the own password. On the second group, the password you set is set as definitive.

entry.title: Re: Automatically update SSL Certificates before they expire in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hi @paubernues

try to set "on integration flow" in HTTPS session reuse

entry.title: Re: API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV AttachmentContentSet Sap Cloud...
entry.content: @mark_fryu you would use this example if you are trying to upload an attachment as a PDF (application/pdf) - https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/7489fa08cede494cbdf08fa3651598af/63259b6826174573bc32f2e1d1609cd9.html

entry.title: HANA DB - Recomendation
entry.content:
Hi Experts.

I need some info. about HANADB Servers.

What is the best plan for auto restart on HANA Servers?

Example: My server has not been restarted for 60 days and the server's performance was bad, after restarting, the performance became better.

If you have any notes indicating this, I would appreciate it.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Purchasing Rebate Processing (2R7) for multiple compa...
entry.content:
Hi @Ronald_Knienieder,

You must use the company code as split header then the system will create a settlement document for each company code with the corresponding business volume.

Please note some downsides for that scenario:
- All settlement document should be created at the same time for the same settlement date, can't create only for a specific company code and the others later. 
- All settlement documents should be reversed at the same time for the same settlement date, if error in 1 settlement document then all the document should be reversed. 
- By standard, you will have 3 different posting documents and output form generated (can have workaround)

Regards, 
Gauthier

entry.title: Re: Using database events
entry.content:
Yes that is an appropriate use of a scheduled event. The event itself can run any stored procedure. 

The thing to be cautious about is how frequently you are querying the monitoring views and the volume of data that you are collecting. I have seen situations where customers have been querying monitoring views so frequently that monitoring workload is having a significant impact on the system performance.

entry.title: Re: Replicating table data from an SAP ECC system with SAP Datasphere using Replication Flows
entry.content: Great Blog Tom, explaining every minute details..

entry.title: Re: not capturing any steps in custom logic tracing app
entry.content:
If you have a three-system landscape, I suggest "key user debugging" as a workaround,

You can find the documentation here:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0f69f8fb28ac4bf48d2b57b9637e81fa/a0397d015c074febad61e80049858864.html#key-user-debugging

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 Flexibility: Adapting UIs for Specific User Roles
entry.content:
Hi @SivaRamaKrishnaP .

I did create an incident ticket, but they said this is a consulting issue, so they did not pass it to the developers.

Is there another way to  "create a ticket to application team"? I may not be aware of this.

Thanks

entry.title: ​​​​SAP Datasphere and Collibra: End-to-End Data Catalog Integration ​​​
entry.content:
We are excited to announce that the integration between SAP Datasphere and Collibra Data Intelligence Platform is now generally available. This integration enables an end-to-end data ​​catalog across SAP and non-SAP sources for a business data fabric, allowing customers to do more with trusted data.​​ 

​​​This blog describes the integration and how it enables metadata to be exchanged between SAP Datasphere catalog and Collibra Data Catalog. The integration facilitates efficient metadata exchange, ensuring robust data governance across your entire data ecosystem with SAP and non-SAP data.​​ 

​​​Configuring SAP Datasphere catalog​​ 

​First let’s have a look at how we configure SAP Datasphere to expose the published assets in the Catalog so it can be consumed in the Collibra Data Catalog.​​​​

Within SAP Datasphere, we have access to our comprehensive catalog. This catalog is our gateway to various assets that are readily available. We can start right from the home page, navigate to the catalog, and directly access all the available SAP metadata that were harvested and enriched. ​

In ​​​the SAP Datasphere ​catalog, we find assets from different connected systems, including terms, KPIs, and other asset types. These assets come from a variety of connected systems from which we harvest the metadata.​

We can navigate to the monitoring associated to the catalog to​ see a list of systems we​ are able to connect and harvest the metadata from. This includes creating new connections to SAP systems such as SAP Analytics Cloud​​​, ​​​SAP Datasphere​​​, or SAP Datasphere BW bridge​. 

To ensure the metadata in SAP Datasphere can be consumed in Collibra, we need to create an OAuth client ​application ​integration​ entry point​. ​​​ 

​​​To create a new OAuth client, access System, then App Integration and click “Add a New OAuth Client”.​​

We can create a new OAuth client, which will allow us to expose the various types of metadata available in our system to Collibra through APIs. ​​​ ​​

The OAuth Client requires a Name, the Purpose must be “API Access” with a “Catalog User API” Access.​​ 

​​When the OAuth client is created, it will generate an ​OAuth ​Client I​D​​​ and a secret that we can use​ in Collibra ​​as an​​​​ entry point to access the available APIs.​​​​​​ ​​

Importing SAP Analytics Cloud Metadata into Collibra Data Catalog​​ 

​​With the OAuth Client I​D​​​ and secret in hand, we can now switch to Collibra to define the entry point to the ​SAP Datasphere catalog​​​. ​​​ ​​

In Collibra, we go to ​​Edge and create a connection using the OAuth details.​​​ ​

​We set up an SAP Datasphere catalog connection by entering the name, description, and the URL of the Datasphere tenant catalog. Then, we use the OAuth Client I​D​​​ and secret generated earlier.​​​ ​​

Once these details are filled in, the connection between Collibra and SAP Datasphere will be established.​​​​​​ 

​​Now it's time to create capabilities​ such as retrieval of​​​ metadata related to SAP Analytics Cloud assets, or different capabilities for other SAP Datasphere asset types. ​​​ ​​

This flexibility allows ​retrieval of​​​ metadata per asset type, tailoring it to your needs.​​​​​

Once a capability is created, we simply hit refresh​​​ to pull the metadata from SAP Datasphere into Collibra, making them accessible in the Collibra catalog.​​​​​​ ​​

​​​Once synchronized, all the metadata are available now in the Collibra Data Catalog to consume.​​ 

Checking available Metadata in Collibra Data Catalog​​ 

​​We can now ​check ​​that​​​​ the metadata ​​were retrieved from SAP Datasphere and ​verify ​​​that all information is available ​by searching​,​ for ​example​​,​​ ​a specific SAP Analytics Cloud model in SAP Datasphere. ​​​ ​​

Let’s search for a particular model and then let’s ​​​examine all the information for this asset​​​.​ ​​​ ​

When we look at the lineage, we can see how the model is used by different SAP Analytics Cloud stories. One might be in the public folder while another is in the system folder. ​

We can now switch to Collibra to confirm that the same information for this asset is now available in the system. ​​​​​​ ​​

We search for the asset by its name and ​​access the detailed metadata including​​​​ the lineage graph, which will display the same information​​ as the one that ​​was​​​​ available in the SAP Datasphere catalog​​.​​​​ ​​

In this lineage graph, we retrieve the information about the model we searched​​ for, and we also see that the model is used by the different SAP Analytics Cloud stories that are in the public folder and in the system folder.​​ ​​

Additionally, Collibra was able to retrieve the available column details for the SAP Analytics Cloud model asset and integrate these details directly in the lineage graph ​​allowing end​​​ ​users a better and more detailed view of the object in the lineage graph.​​​​ 

In summary, we've shown how SAP ​delivers robust​​​ data governance with Collibra and how SAP Datasphere empowers you to harness the full potential of your business data to derive critical business ​decisions​​​.​ The integration between the SAP Datasphere catalog and the Collibra ​​D​​​​ata ​​C​​​​atalog streamlines data management, enabling users to efficiently oversee the entire data lifecycle across both platforms​​,​​ helping to increase data governance within organizations.​ 

​​​For an in​​-​​​​product tour of this functionality go to the Collibra Data Intelligence​​ Platform with SAP Datasphere​​ ​​product tour available here. ​     ​​​​​​​​​

entry.title: Re: Read/validate xml namespace using groovy script in SA...
entry.content: Thanks Ryan - but it generates a syntax error in Altova XMLSPY and even in iflow. Invalid nbr of arguments is the error

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the beginner corner!
entry.content: @DanielyCarvalho - Check out my blog on networking here! Best of luck.

entry.title: Asset Depreciation: Additions made during the year
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

I really hope that you`ll be able to help me!

I am facing the following issue, related to additions made to the asset: the original asset was acquired on 01.02.2023. After 2023 was closed, two additions (additional acquisitions with transaction type 100) were made: one on 01.03.2024 & the second one on 01.06.2024 (no group assets or sub-assets are used). 

The problem is arising when we verify the Useful Life & Depreciation forecast (AR18N). 
The original asset has Useful Life of 2 years & 8 months. Until 31.01.2024 (client has Fiscal Year Variant Feb-Jan), 11 months got expired out of the Useful Life. Meaning, that the asset is expected to be fully depreciation by October 2025. However, we performed multiple testings and found out that because of these additional acquisitions, system somehow shifts the depreciation to November & December further (each addition adds 1 month to useful life, period control for acquisition - to start depreciation from the next month after the acquisition). 

We tried to implement the AVDate (XBZDAT) in table T090NP to have this field activated, but it didn`t help. The behavior is the same. 

Is there is any other way to do it? Are we missing something? (Without sub-numbers).

entry.title: Re: Mass Change Active Materials Type - All materials ROH...
entry.content:
Michelle 

This is my view only Reimplementation is only considered when you want to reinvent business processes and reduce the customizations or complex development or processes to simple and best practices of SAP or industry. 

As your system is already 1709 you can upgrade to the next version without going too much reinventing the wheel where you have to start from scope items, business requirements, BPML, Development of enhancements, etc. A typical Upgrade has be 3-4 months timeline which I guess your project would be suggesting where whereas implementation can be from 6 to 1 year and a lot more consultants are needed which means more money to be invested compared to an upgrade. 

You can make use to material status to make sure no more transactions take place such new PRs or POs etc while clear them -- putting material status to make it is blocked for any business processes is normally the first step- If no one is complaining then mark of deletion is next step. My understanding if you are upgrading and not archiving any thing whatever tables or history you have will be available in next version. However, I am sure with implementation you will lose that history and you have to find other ways to view your legacy data (it can be SAP Data Sphere or any other DB placeholder).

Reimplementation would require a clear cutover plan for the conversion of open documents etc but you can bring in any history. 

Plus i do not think you can change material type if you have any business transactions that open such as inventory, PO or WOs or SOs, Production order etc.

entry.title: SAC Report Broadcasting - Blog 1 - Imported Data
entry.content:
Introduction

Hello and welcome to this blog series where I will be discussing the functionality of report broadcasting in SAC. I will address the following points:

  • Setting up
  • How to create publications
  • View and Modify your Scheduled Publications
  • SAP and non-SAP Users
  • Data Validation and Refresh

 

Setting up

The first step you need to take to set up SAC report broadcasting is allowing the tenant to schedule a publication. You can set up the tenant so that SAC can publish to either SAP users or non-SAP users or both.

 

  1. Login to your SAC tenant
  2. Go to System >> Administration. Click on the System Configuration tab and toggle the two schedule publication options on.

 

 

How to create publications

  1. Go to your files in SAC
  2. Select the story or analytical application you want to schedule for publication. Choose the Share option and select Schedule Publication.

  1. The Schedule Publication window will open. Here you will add your publication information such as event name, start date etc.

Name

Give your Schedule a name

Start Date

Give your schedule a start date and time. You can add a recurrence so that the publication is scheduled to recur every day/ week/ month etc. You can also add details about ending the recurrence.

File Type

You can choose between either a PDF, PowerPoint or CSV

Email Subject

This is the subject for the email which would be delivered to the recipients

Email Message

This is the message body for the email which would be sent to the recipients over email

Email Delivery Options

You can choose which email delivery option you’d like:

·       Attachment

·       Attachment and Preview Inline

·       Preview Inline

Include link to story

If you select this checkbox, the story/ analytic application link would be sent along with the email.

 

 

  1. Add details to the Distribution heading

SAP Analytics Cloud Recipients

Add SAP users or teams to this view

Non-SAP Analytics Cloud Recipients

Add non-SAP users to this view e.g. joe.bloggs@hotmail.com . You can input a maximum of 3 non-SAC users.

Story view

You can choose the story, global bookmarks or my bookmarks.

File Name

The name the file will appear under in your email as a attachment

 

 

  1. Click on Create. This will set up a schedule a publication.

 

View and Modify your Scheduled Publications

  1. Go to the Calendar app in SAC

 

  1. You can see in Calendar, your scheduled publication events and its recurrence.

  1. You can also edit you’re a recurrence event. Select the recurrence event from the calendar view and on your right side, a new panel opens where you can modify.

 

SAP and Non-SAP Users

You can schedule a publication to be sent to both SAP users and non-SAP users. SAP users are users who have been given a user license for their SAC tenant. They are users who can login to their tenant and view/ create model, stories etc.

Non-SAP users are users who do not have access to the SAC tenant. These email addresses would be considered personal addresses rather than work addresses. You can have a maximum of 3 non-SAP users assigned to a scheduled publication.

 

Data Validation and Refresh

It is important for the data in the scheduled publications are up to date an accurate especially if they are recurring. A user does not want to receive the wrong data or the same data that they received in last week’s report.

Data imported from a CSV file:

If data imported from a CSV file is used to create a story/ analytical application dashboard in SAC, this data will need to be updated manually.

 

Conclusion

In summary, SAC report broadcasting offers a powerful tool for automating your data distribution. By carefully setting up your tenant and creating well-defined publication schedules, allows you to efficiently manage and deliver relevant reports to both SAP and non-SAP users. This capability not only enhances your reporting efficiency but also ensures that stakeholders receive timely and accurate information, ultimately supporting better decision-making and communication within your organisation.

entry.title: Re: CDS --profile hybrid
entry.content: add `--resolve-bindings` option to resolve bindings for hybrid.

Also, please check the linkage type in T code SWERYPV for WS02000458. Screenshot 2 is attached.

Sanan

entry.title: Re: New trial capability for SAP Application Interface Framework

Best regards,

VR

entry.title: How to download a file (LargeBinary) in a MDK application?
entry.content:
Hello community, thanks for your help. I have an MDK application, I need to download a file that is converted into binaries (in the CAP service the entity column is of type LargeBinary). I have this:

When the user presses the "Download Attachment" button, I need the download to start. How can I do that? I have created a rule but it doesn't work...

On the other hand, I don't know if my approach is correct, since in the step where the user uploads the file I use the "Attachment" control and in the "AttachmentActionType" section I only allow the "SelectFile" option. And I link the file with this column that I mentioned earlier.

The save button has an OData action:

Also, the "Attachment" control allows you to upload more than one file and I only want to limit it to one, I don't know how to do that. Any recommendations are welcome.

entry.title: Re: Details of PR not showing on MY Fiori Inbox SAP S4/HANA
entry.content:
There are few SAP Notes that you may have to check to resolve this issue -- I have mentioned a few below 

2525367 - Purchase requisition details in My inbox app - SAP S/4HANA - SAP for Me

2898917 - Purchase Requisition details do not load in My Inbox app - SAP S/4HANA - SAP for Me

3214647 - Item details are missing for Purchasing documents in My Inbox App - SAP S/4HANA - SAP for Me

3436696 - Requisitioner field is not showing in My Inbox app for Purchase Requisitions - SAP for Me

VR

entry.title: Re: SPM Embedded Analytics Insights with SAC Publications
entry.content:
Hello @Vasavi_Rongali,

interesting blog 😊

One question comes to my mind: What exactly do you mean with "Embedded Analytics" ... in S4 terms, I think you would associate e.g. the Embedded Analytic Apps within FI with it, which bring different CDS Cube views & Query views, which you could use for a Live Reporting in SAC.

But for those the publication would not work, if the S4 system is not connected via Tunnel.

You examples describe publication from import models, right? But what is "embedded" here? 🤔

BR, Martin

entry.title: SAP Datasphere - public vs private tenants
entry.content:
Hi all,

SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere are both part of SAP BTP. With SAP Analytics Cloud, we have the option of purchasing private tenant licenses, or public tenant licenses, where system resources are shared between multiple customers using the same tenant. 

Does the same option exist for SAP Datasphere?

Thanks,

Hugh

entry.title: Re: 2001070576 is not in interval that is provided for th...
entry.content: Thank you so much for this information. This issue was that our From range in SNRO was incorrect. Once we updated that, the HU error went away.

entry.title: Re: Recursion in SAP ABAP
entry.content: Pay attention to the running time for recursions. The first variant for the Fibonacci numbers not only takes twice as long. The running time here grows at about the same rate as the Fibonacci numbers themselves.

entry.title: Managing Encryption Keys and Certificates for Better Data Security
entry.content:
If you’re an SAP Fieldglass Configuration Manager user, you have some special powers. One of them is changing your company’s config in a blink of an eye, but did you know you also have the ability to protect your company's sensitive info? In today’s digital landscape, with data breaches and cyber threats on the rise, safeguarding confidential information is on top of everyone’s mind.

Use the Encryption Keys and Certificates tile on the Configuration Manager self-service dashboard to create and manage your company’s different types of security assets and be called a superhero!

Simplifying Security Asset Management

Business applications handle confidential data, and securing this data often involves complex encryption processes. But managing these essential security assets doesn’t have to be complex! The Encryption Keys and Certificates tile makes it easy for you. Check what you can do with this feature:

  • Create and Manage Assets: easily generate and handle encryption keys and certificates, ensuring that sensitive data remains protected across all business applications.
  • Reduce Duplication: by consolidating key and certificate management into a single interface, SAP Fieldglass reduces duplication of code and processes, making your security practices more efficient.
  • Ensure Compliance and Oversight: Information Security departments, auditors, and other stakeholders can review and verify the security assets and methods used to protect confidential information, ensuring that your practices meet the security standards.

Take a look at the asset options this feature provides:

  • (PGP) Key
  • Public Key Infrastructure (PKI)
  • Symmetric Key (DEK)
  • X.509
  • SSH Key

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Elevate your data security practices with the Encryption Keys and Certificates. Create, generate, activate, rotate, and revoke encryption keys with ease. And let the system manage key storage and retrieval. It’s its job after all 😉

Disclaimer: the characters from Justice League mentioned in this content are the intellectual property of DC Comics and Warner Bros. Entertainment Inc. We are using these characters purely for non-commercial purposes and do not intend to gain any monetary benefits from their use. We acknowledge and respect the rights of DC Comics and Warner Bros. Entertainment Inc. as the rightful owners.

Regards

Wiktoria

entry.title: Re: Margin Analysis 4 Sell from stock in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Dear Stefan,

I've reviewed the latest version of SAP Note 3357625 - Event-Based Revenue Recognition with SAP S/4HANA 2023: Release Information Note.

From what I can see, it appears that the previous limitation you mentioned, where "EBRR does not yet support the sales order with its own CO Object (VB object)," might have been addressed in S/4HANA 2023.

Could you please confirm if this is indeed the case? Specifically, does EBRR now support MTO with valuated sales order stock (SOBKZ=E) and sales order items that are cost objects (KZVBR=E)?

Thank you for your clarification.

Best regards

Francesco

entry.title: Error in direct input(RCPTRA02) LSMW for Routing mass change
entry.content:
Hello all,

I am trying to change already existing routing in LSMW with direct input program RCPTRA02(as per SAP Note 1644841) . But I am getting belwo two errors for activity types & header alternative,

Is there any other way to do mass change in Routing via BAPI ? I am aware of CEWB but this seems complex way to business. We need something like BAPI_ROUTING_CREATE with which we can create custom tool.

Regards,

Akshay

entry.title: Re: End User Experience monitoring with SAP GUI for priva...
entry.content:
Hi,

It is currently not possible to measure SAPGUI frontend interactions using SAP Cloud ALM Real User Monitoring.
If you desire this feature, please search on the SAP Customer Influence SAP Cloud ALM for Operations campaign for a matching request and vote on it. If an existing request is not found, please create one and outline your business need for this functionality.

Thanks and regards, 
John
